title: Lamb and Savory Pie
description: A Chinese-inspired twist on traditional lamb pie, with a savory and smoky flavor profile.
instructions: Roll out the savoy pie crust and place in a pie dish.
In a pan, cook the lamb over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned.
Add the savory spice blend and smoked paprika to the pan and stir to combine.
Stir in the sliced mediterranean olives and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the lamb mixture to the pie crust and top with the thinly sliced green onions.
Bake the pie for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
